input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.8.7.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.8.7.2
            TITLE: the peak load for the type of impact attenuator:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.8.7.2: The peak load for the type of Impact Attenuator:
F.8.7.2 The peak load for the type of Impact Attenuator:  
• Standard Foam Impact Attenuator   95 kN 
• Standard Honeycomb Impact Attenuator 60 kN 
• Tested Impact Attenuator    peak as measured

final_answer: rule F.8.7.2: The peak load for the type of Impact Attenuator: F.8.7.2 The peak load for the type of Impact Attenuator: • Standard Foam Impact Attenuator 95 kN • Standard Honeycomb Impact Attenuator 60 kN • Tested Impact Attenuator peak as measured
